Smart Security

Entry, resolved.

Biometric fingerprint, PIN access and a live camera display, housed in a single refined unit — security detailed with the same care as the door it sits on.

  • Fingerprint biometric recognition
  • PIN code & RFID card access
  • Smart camera with live display
  • Emergency key override
  • App connectivity on select models
Decorative Brass

Door knockers.

“Hardware is the only part of a building a hand actually touches. It deserves the same rigour as the elevation it serves.”
Pollo — Swiss India, Aligarh

75 Products — 11 Categories

The Collection.

Our Story

Crafting hardware
with character.

For over two decades, POLLO by Swiss India has set the benchmark for architectural door hardware in India — where engineering precision meets considered design.

OUR PHILOSOPHY

We believe security should never compromise aesthetics. Every product begins as a design object first — one that then performs to the durability modern architecture demands.

We work across Stainless Steel, SS/Zinc alloy, Mild Steel and premium Brass, offering one of the broadest material ranges in Indian hardware.

MANUFACTURING HERITAGE

Manufactured in Aligarh — the hardware capital of the world — our production combines precision CNC machining with skilled hand-finishing for decorative pieces.

From the clean lines of our SMH stainless handles to the hand-cast detail of our brass knockers, every product passes rigorous quality control.

Revision Log

Our journey, as recorded.

REV. A

Swiss India Established

Founded in Aligarh, U.P. — the world centre of lock and hardware manufacturing.

REV. B

POLLO Brand Launched

Launched with a focus on premium finishes, designer forms, and the belief that hardware should be as considered as the door it adorns.

REV. C

Digital Lock Series

Introduced the PL-series smart locks, with fingerprint biometrics, PIN access and camera surveillance.

REV. D

2026 Collection

75 products across 11 categories, with new two-tone finishes in Gold Black, Black Rose Gold and Antique Gold.
